target.title: fix(heartbeat): skip pendingFinalDelivery when reply strips to HEARTBEAT_OK
target.body:
## Summary

- keep heartbeat replies that strip to acknowledgement-only text out of `pendingFinalDelivery` so `HEARTBEAT_OK` does not become durable replay text
- clear existing ack-only heartbeat pending replay state before `getReplyFromConfig` retries it, preserving normal pending replay for real content
- let recent ack-only pending state pass the heartbeat runner's 30s requests-in-flight defer guard instead of self-refreshing the skip window
- add regression coverage for ack-only suppression, real heartbeat content preservation, and runner defer behavior

Fixes #79258.

## Audit

- Audit A (existing helper): reused existing `stripHeartbeatToken`; no new token parser
- Audit B (shared callers): helper contract preserved; call sites add heartbeat-specific gating only
- Audit C (broader rival): no non-hclsys rival PR found; this updates existing hclsys #79270 instead of opening a duplicate

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: heartbeat ack text such as `HEARTBEAT_OK` or `All clear.\n\nHEARTBEAT_OK` must not become durable pending final-delivery replay state, while real heartbeat notification text must still be preserved for delivery recovery.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on current `origin/main` (`0f31b6424e`) using production TypeScript modules through `node --import tsx`, plus the affected project test shards.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node --import tsx - <<'NODEEOF'
import { stripHeartbeatToken } from './src/auto-reply/heartbeat.ts';
const ack = stripHeartbeatToken('HEARTBEAT_OK', { mode: 'heartbeat' });
const preambleAck = stripHeartbeatToken('All clear.\n\nHEARTBEAT_OK', { mode: 'heartbeat' });
const real = stripHeartbeatToken('Sent daily summary to channel.', { mode: 'heartbeat' });
console.log(JSON.stringify({ ack, preambleAck, real }, null, 2));
NODEEOF
pnpm test src/infra/heartbeat-runner.skips-busy-session-lane.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts
pnpm test src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.skips-busy-session-lane.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.heartbeat-no-reset.test.ts
pnpm check:changed
```

- Evidence after fix: terminal output from the production heartbeat token classifier after this patch:

```json
{
  "ack": {
    "shouldSkip": true,
    "text": "",
    "didStrip": true
  },
  "preambleAck": {
    "shouldSkip": true,
    "text": "",
    "didStrip": true
  },
  "real": {
    "shouldSkip": false,
    "text": "Sent daily summary to channel.",
    "didStrip": false
  }
}
```

- Observed result after fix: the production classifier now separates ack-only heartbeat output from real notification text; the changed call sites use that result so ack-only pending state is skipped/cleared and real text remains eligible for pending final delivery. Local focused heartbeat runner + agent-runner tests passed 40 tests, broader acceptance tests passed 87 tests, and `pnpm check:changed` passed.
- What was not tested: no live gateway heartbeat daemon was run, no real 60-minute production heartbeat interval was observed, and no external Telegram/Discord delivery adapter was invoked.
